rules.message: Retrieval query has limited context for healthcare evidence ranking.
rules.suggested_action: Add a schema, resource type, clinical domain, standard, or field list.

rules.message: No healthcare retrieval concept matched deterministic query rules.
rules.suggested_action: Use explicit terms such as FHIR, LOINC, UCUM, RxNorm, OMOP, MeSH, lab, unit, medication, literature, or patient identifier when relevant.

rules.message: Applied standard_system={applied_standard} does not match detected query standards: {suggested_standards}.
rules.suggested_action: Remove the standard filter or choose one of the detected standard filters.

rules.message: Retrieval has {filter_count} active metadata filters ({active_filters}) but limited query context.
rules.suggested_action: Add schema, fields, resource type, format, or clinical terms; otherwise remove narrow filters before judging evidence coverage.
